name: human-like-novel
description: 从根源上解决AI生成痕迹问题（重复描写、节奏单一、用词单调、精确数字）。通过情绪词库、设定点范例库、章节三要素计划、负面约束系统、引用触发机制，让AI写出具有'人感'的小说。
description_zh: 仿人类小说创作技能，根治AI生成痕迹（重复、节奏单一、用词单调、精确数字），支持旁征博引和流行文化引用，让AI写出有人感的小说。
description_en: Human-like novel writing skill that eliminates AI fingerprints (repetition, uniform rhythm, monotonous wording, precise numbers). Features emotion word library, setting example library, chapter three-element plan, negative constraint system, and citation trigger mechanism.
author: Sai
